title: QuickSite Workflow
description: Schema for workflow files used in QuickSite admin panel (AI-assisted or manual)

titleKey.description: Translation key for the workflow title (core workflows)

name.description: Direct display name (custom workflows without i18n)

descriptionKey.description: Translation key for the workflow description (core workflows)

description.description: Direct description text (custom workflows without i18n)

staticData.description: Static data available in steps via forEach or template placeholders. Keys become data paths (e.g., 'assets' is referenced as forEach: 'assets').

preWorkflows.description: Workflows to run BEFORE this workflow's steps. Each can optionally specify params and a condition.

oneOf.description: Workflow ID to run with default params

params.description: Parameters to pass to the sub-workflow. Can use {{param.x}} to forward values.

condition.description: Condition to evaluate. Sub-workflow is skipped if false. Supports param.x, data.x, operators.

postWorkflows.description: Workflows to run AFTER this workflow's steps complete. Same format as preWorkflows.

oneOf.description: Workflow ID to run with default params

params.description: Parameters to pass to the sub-workflow. Can use {{param.x}} to forward values.

condition.description: Condition to evaluate. Sub-workflow is skipped if false. Supports param.x, data.x, operators.

parameters.description: User-configurable parameters shown in the UI

oneOf.description: Dynamic options from a command, e.g., 'dynamic:getLangList.data.languages'

condition.description: Conditional expression to show/hide this parameter. Supports: paramId === value, paramId !== value, paramId (truthy). Example: 'multilingual === true'

structures.description: For nodeSelector type: which structure types to show for node selection

allowTextHint.description: For nodeSelector type: allow user to type a text hint instead of selecting a node

optional.description: Whether this parameter can be left empty

dataRequirements.description: List of data needed from the system via CommandRunner

params.description: Parameters to pass to the command

extract.description: Dot-notation path to extract specific data (e.g., 'data.languages')

condition.description: Parameter ID or expression. Data is only fetched when this evaluates to truthy. Example: 'targetPage' or 'multilingual === true'

relatedCommands.description: API commands that will be used in the generated output

promptTemplate.description: Filename of the .md prompt template (same folder as spec)

steps.description: For manual workflows: commands to execute directly (no AI). Presence of steps without promptTemplate makes this a manual workflow.

specCommand.description: A command or template to execute automatically

comment.description: Optional comment for documentation/debugging purposes. Ignored during execution.

condition.description: Condition expression. Supports: param.X === value, config.MULTILINGUAL_SUPPORT === true, data.X for dataRequirements. Also supports && and || operators.

forEach.description: Data path to iterate over (e.g., 'routes', 'assets', 'langData.languages'). Generates one command per item. Use {{$key}} and {{$value}} in params.

filter.description: Filter expression for forEach items. Supports {{$key}}, {{$value}}, {{$value.prop}}, and {{dataPath}} references. Items where filter evaluates to false are skipped.

template.description: Name of a batch template to execute (mutually exclusive with command)

command.description: API command name to execute (mutually exclusive with template)

method.description: HTTP method to use for the command. Default: POST for workflow steps.

params.description: Parameters for the command. Supports {{config.X}}, {{param.X}}, {{dataRequirementId.path}}, and in forEach: {{$key}}, {{$value}}, {{$value.field}}

abortOnFail.description: If true, abort the entire workflow if this command fails

retryOn.description: HTTP status codes that should trigger an automatic retry (e.g., [409, 503]). Only retries when the response status matches one of these codes.

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts when retryOn matches. Default: 3.

retryDelayMs.description: Delay in milliseconds between retry attempts. Default: 1000ms.

eachLoop.description: Loop construct for generating arrays from config data

$item.description: Template for each item. Use {{$key}} and {{$value}} for placeholders
